description: Posts featuring restaurant or food venue reviews with specific ratings, location tags, and detailed descriptions of offerings and ambiance to establish credibility and inform audience decisions.
structural_recipe: Structure the post with: (1) Restaurant/venue name in Arabic and English transliteration, (2) Precise location tag with landmarks, (3) Photo credit attribution, (4) Clear status indicator (new/established), (5) Detailed description of cuisine type and unique offerings in Arabic, (6) Mention of special features (retail spaces, ambiance). Use location-based discovery format to maximize local reach.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences value detailed, credible information before dining decisions. Attribution to photography sources builds trust. Bilingual naming and transliteration accommodates diverse literacy levels. Specific location markers (university, mall names) aid discovery and reduce friction in decision-making. New venue announcements tap into early-adopter interest and FOMO.
transplantation_caveats: Requires accurate location information—vague or incorrect details undermine credibility in Saudi market
Photo attribution critical for trust; unlicensed images may violate platform norms
Mixing multiple languages requires fluency; poor Arabic diminishes perceived authenticity
New venue claims must be verifiable—false novelty claims damage account reputation
cultural_constraints: Must comply with halal/Islamic dietary standards in descriptions
Location details should respect gender-separated spaces where applicable
Avoid assumptions about alcohol availability or mixed-gender seating
